CustomHasher

Ƭ CustomHasher: (task: Task, context: HasherContext) => Promise<Hash>

Type declaration

Section titled “Type declaration”

▸ (task, context): Promise<Hash>

Parameters
Section titled “Parameters”
NameType
taskTask
contextHasherContext
Returns
Section titled “Returns”

Promise<Hash>
